project.name: TaskFlow
project.description: A project management application for small development teams that need lightweight sprint planning, task tracking, and team collaboration without the complexity of enterprise tools.

functional.title: User authentication
functional.description: Users can register, login, and manage their accounts with email/password or OAuth (Google, GitHub).

functional.title: Sprint planning board
functional.description: Kanban-style board with customizable columns (Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done). Drag-and-drop task movement.

functional.title: Task management
functional.description: Create, edit, assign, and track tasks with title, description, assignee, priority, story points, labels, and due date.

functional.title: Team collaboration
functional.description: Comment threads on tasks, @mentions, activity feed, and email notifications for assignments and mentions.

functional.title: Reporting dashboard
functional.description: Burndown charts, velocity tracking, sprint summaries, and team workload distribution.

functional.title: Integration with GitHub
functional.description: Link tasks to GitHub PRs and commits. Auto-update task status when PRs are merged.

non_functional.description: Page load time under 2 seconds for all views
Support up to 50 concurrent users per workspace
All data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)

integrations.description: OAuth login + PR/commit linking via GitHub API v4 (GraphQL)
Transactional email notifications for assignments and mentions
